mapper.sql: rai.re_id as rri_id, rai.type, rai.award_name, rai.award_star_time, rai.award_end_time, rai.award_company, rai.award_content, rai.award_result, rai.award_money, rai.reference_backup_flag, rai.remarks, rai.attribute1, rai.attribute2, rai.attribute3, rai.enabled_flag, rai.id, rai.create_time, rai.update_by, rai.update_time, rai.create_by

${tAlias}.re_id as ${tAlias}_rri_id, ${tAlias}.type as ${tAlias}_type, ${tAlias}.award_name as ${tAlias}_award_name, ${tAlias}.award_star_time as ${tAlias}_award_star_time, ${tAlias}.award_end_time as ${tAlias}_award_end_time, ${tAlias}.award_company as ${tAlias}_award_company, ${tAlias}.award_content as ${tAlias}_award_content, ${tAlias}.award_result as ${tAlias}_award_result, ${tAlias}.award_money as ${tAlias}_award_money, ${tAlias}.reference_backup_flag as ${tAlias}_reference_backup_flag, ${tAlias}.remarks as ${tAlias}_remarks, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by
mapper.insert: insert into re_award_interface (re_id, type, award_name, award_star_time, award_end_time, award_company, award_content, award_result, award_money, reference_backup_flag, remarks, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, enabled_flag, create_time, update_by, update_time, create_by) values (#{recruitmentInterface.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{awardName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{awardStarTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{awardEndTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{awardCompany,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{awardContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{awardResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{awardMoney,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{referenceBackupFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{remarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update re_award_interface set re_id = #{recruitmentInterface.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, type = #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, award_name = #{awardName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, award_star_time = #{awardStarTime,jdbcType=DATE}, award_end_time = #{awardEndTime,jdbcType=DATE}, award_company = #{awardCompany,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, award_content = #{awardContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, award_result = #{awardResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, award_money = #{awardMoney,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, reference_backup_flag = #{referenceBackupFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, remarks = #{remarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
